languages.text: Ксеностраж музеона признал, что Багряная пляска Кхейна похищена и обращена в экспонат. Чтобы ее отыскать, сперва следует найти "интерактивную диораму".

traits.locale_text: Ксеностраж музеона признал, что Багряная пляска Кхейна похищена и обращена в экспонат. Чтобы ее отыскать, сперва следует найти "интерактивную диораму".

languages.text: The Museion's xenos guardian admitted the Crimson Dance of Khaine has been stolen and turned into an exhibit. To recover it, you must first find the "interactive diorama."
languages.original_text: Ксеностраж музеона признал, что Багряная пляска Кхейна похищена и обращена в экспонат. Чтобы ее отыскать, сперва следует найти "интерактивную диораму".

traits.locale_text: The Museion's xenos guardian admitted the Crimson Dance of Khaine has been stolen and turned into an exhibit. To recover it, you must first find the "interactive diorama."
The Museion's xenos guardian admitted the Crimson Dance of Khaine has been stolen and turned into an exhibit. To recover it, you must first find the "interactive diorama."
The Museion's xenos guardian admitted the Crimson Dance of Khaine has been stolen and turned into an exhibit. To recover it, you must first find the "interactive diorama."
The Museion's xenos guardian admitted the Crimson Dance of Khaine has been stolen and turned into an exhibit. To recover it, you must first find the "interactive diorama."

languages.text: Der Xenos-Wächter des Museions hat eingeräumt, dass Blutroter Tanz von Khaine gestohlen und in ein Exponat verwandelt wurde. Um die Klinge zu bergen, musst du das 'interaktive Diorama' finden.
languages.original_text: The Museion's xenos guardian admitted the Crimson Dance of Khaine has been stolen and turned into an exhibit. To recover it, you must first find the "interactive diorama."

traits.locale_text: Der Xenos-Wächter des Museions hat eingeräumt, dass Blutroter Tanz von Khaine gestohlen und in ein Exponat verwandelt wurde. Um die Klinge zu bergen, musst du das 'interaktive Diorama' finden.

languages.text: Le gardien xénos a admis que la Danse écarlate de Khaine avait été volée afin de figurer parmi les pièces d'exposition du Muséion. Pour la retrouver, vous devez d'abord découvrir l'emplacement du « diorama interactif ».
languages.original_text: The Museion's xenos guardian admitted the Crimson Dance of Khaine has been stolen and turned into an exhibit. To recover it, you must first find the "interactive diorama."

traits.locale_text: Le gardien xénos a admis que la Danse écarlate de Khaine avait été volée afin de figurer parmi les pièces d'exposition du Muséion. Pour la retrouver, vous devez d'abord découvrir l'emplacement du « diorama interactif ».

languages.text: 陈列馆的异形守卫承认，凯恩的猩红之舞已被窃并沦为了一件展品。要把它夺回来，就必须先找到那个“互动式实景模型”。
languages.original_text: The Museion's xenos guardian admitted the Crimson Dance of Khaine has been stolen and turned into an exhibit. To recover it, you must first find the "interactive diorama."

traits.locale_text: 陈列馆的异形守卫承认，凯恩的猩红之舞已被窃并沦为了一件展品。要把它夺回来，就必须先找到那个“互动式实景模型”。

languages.text: El guardián xenos del Museion ha admitido que la Danza Carmesí de Khaine fue robada y convertida en una exposición. Para recuperarla, primero necesitas encontrar el «diorama interactivo».
languages.original_text: The Museion's xenos guardian admitted the Crimson Dance of Khaine has been stolen and turned into an exhibit. To recover it, you must first find the "interactive diorama."

traits.locale_text: El guardián xenos del Museion ha admitido que la Danza Carmesí de Khaine fue robada y convertida en una exposición. Para recuperarla, primero necesitas encontrar el «diorama interactivo».

languages.text: ミューゼオンのゼノストラテジーは、ブラッドハンド・フューリーが誘拐され、展示品になっていることを認識した。彼を見つけるには、まず「インタラクティブ・ジオラマ」を見つけなければならない。
languages.original_text: The Xenostrategy of the Museon has recognised that the Blood-Handed Fury has been kidnapped and has become an exhibit. To find him, you must first find the "interactive diorama".

languages.text: Museion'un zeno muhafızı, Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı'nın çalındığını ve bir sergi parçasına dönüştürüldüğünü itiraf etti. Onu geri almak için önce "etkileşimli diyorama" denen şeyi bulmalısın.
languages.original_text: The Museion's xenos guardian admitted the Crimson Dance of Khaine has been stolen and turned into an exhibit. To recover it, you must first find the "interactive diorama."

traits.locale_text: Museion'un zeno muhafızı, Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı'nın çalındığını ve bir sergi parçasına dönüştürüldüğünü itiraf etti. Onu geri almak için önce "etkileşimli diyorama" denen şeyi bulmalısın.
